note: seq=23 (PLACEHOLDER -- publish renumber/sign/push). DECOMPOSED MULTI-SCORE -- replaces the single 0-100 with five STORED components (Fit/Need/Timing/Contactability/Conversion) scored off the golden record (item 2) + outcome rollup (item 1). IMPROVEMENT over the brittle source plan (which multiplies all five and zeroes good leads): worth_pursuing=Fit*Need*Timing (intrinsic value), reachable_now=Contactability (a HARD GATE for outreach, NOT a multiplier that destroys value), likely_convert=Conversion (LEARNED from outcomes, degrades to neutral 0.5 when absent -- never penalizes for missing data). ROUTING: high-worth + low-reach -> action='reenrich' (deeper enrichment, NEVER trash); high-worth + reachable -> 'outreach_eligible' (still must clear the compliance gate, item 4); low-worth -> 'deprioritize'. Keeps the visible 0-100 (stored score_0_100) + stores every component in atlas.lead_score_components. ADDITIVE: own components table (idempotent UPSERT) + fills golden lead_score column IF present; no DDL on existing tables here; .gov/.mil never scored for outreach. VERIFIED THIS SESSION (sandbox): py_compile clean; --selftest EXIT 0 proving the anti-brittleness fix (fresh perfect-fit med_spa with thin contactability -> worth=0.848, action=reenrich, visible=56.6 NOT discarded), contactability-is-a-gate-not-a-multiplier (equal worth, reach only flips action eligible<->reenrich), and no-outcome conversion = neutral 0.5. VERIFY-ON-BOX: real golden volume + real outcome weights. SHA-gated fetch + --migrate + --selftest gate before the 10-min timer.

steps.note: seq=23: decomposed multi-score (Fit/Need/Timing/Contactability/Conversion). Contactability=gate not multiplier; high-worth low-reach -> reenrich not trash; visible 0-100 retained.

steps.cmd: /opt/atlas/venv/bin/python -c "import hashlib,sys; w={'/opt/atlas/importers/atlas_multiscore.py':'00df732f54335c36485ec69af792aaab89b2334b9856955b07c85e4e745f079b'}; [sys.exit('SHA MISMATCH '+p) for p,h in w.items() if hashlib.sha256(open(p,'rb').read()).hexdigest()!=h]; print('sha ok')"

steps.content:
[Unit]
Description=ATLAS decomposed multi-score (Fit/Need/Timing/Contactability/Conversion off the golden record)
Documentation=https://github.com/cloudwalker171/atlas-manifests
After=network-online.target postgresql.service
Wants=network-online.target

[Service]
Type=oneshot
Nice=11
IOSchedulingClass=idle
EnvironmentFile=-/etc/atlas/db.env
EnvironmentFile=-/etc/atlas/autopull.env
Environment=ATLAS_DB_ENV=/etc/atlas/db.env
ExecStart=/opt/atlas/venv/bin/python /opt/atlas/importers/atlas_multiscore.py
TimeoutStartSec=1h

[Unit]
Description=ATLAS multi-score -- recompute components every 10 min

[Timer]
OnBootSec=7min
OnUnitActiveSec=10min
Persistent=true
Unit=atlas-multiscore.service

[Install]
WantedBy=timers.target
